français: Many insects have hatched this year.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'yasser mn lhacharat merget tha l3am'. En arabe : 'ياسر من الحشرات مرگت ذا العام.'.

hassaniya: lkethab ila fat elin ynkbeth lahi tem nas thherk fih elin yhchem
français: If a liar is caught, people will mock him until he feels ashamed.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'lkethab ila fat elin ynkbeth lahi tem nas thherk fih elin yhchem'. En arabe : 'الكذاب منين ينكبض الناس لاهي تم تضحك فيه الين يحشم'.

hassaniya: mahou ay hed ysselem 3la lostath blyed
français: Not everyone can greet the teacher by shaking hands.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'mahou ay hed ysselem 3la lostath blyed'. En arabe : 'ما هو أي حد يسلم على الأستاذ باليد.'.

hassaniya: la 3ad maybghini hette ,makan lahi y3tini fethtou
français: He loves me very much otherwise he wouldn't have given me his money.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'la 3ad maybghini hette ,makan lahi y3tini fethtou'. En arabe : 'لا عاد ما يبغيني حتا ، ما كان لاهي يعطيني فضتو.'.

français: The goat has run into the field.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'cha gamet tejri flber'. En arabe : 'الشا گامت تجري فالبر.'.

hassaniya: fte7 lktab o khelah mchaya3 fshab
français: He has opened the book and left it in the rain.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'fte7 lktab o khelah mchaya3 fshab'. En arabe : 'فتح الكتاب او خلاه مشيع فالسحاب'.

français: He has disclosed the discussion I had with him to other people.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'klam geltoulou kamel,lehgou larwagij'. En arabe : 'كلام گلتولو كامل ،لحگو لارواگيج.'.
En hassaniya : 'lladawat mnin hia?'. En arabe : 'الأدوات منن هيا ؟'.

hassaniya: chrina lktoub , o hia waghdet ktabha
français: We bought books and she lost hers.
exemple: En hassaniya : 'chrina lktoub , o hia waghdet ktabha'. En arabe : 'شرينا الكتب، وهي وغدت كتابها.'.

français: Where have you kept his books?
exemple: En hassaniya : 'mnin treht ktoubek?'. En arabe : 'منين طرحت كتوبك؟'.
En hassaniya : 'hathou n3ayel mohamed'. En arabe : 'هذو نعايل محمد سالم.'.
